vertical: Senior Living Real Estate — Buyer & Referral Leads
offering: Cadabams WeNest sells, leases and rents senior-friendly 1 & 2 BHK homes (approx INR 52-67 lakh) in a luxury senior-living community at Kaggalipura / Kanakapura Road, Bangalore. Barrier-free homes with 24/7 medical and nursing support, assisted living, dining, wellness and an assured buyback option. We need leads who would BUY, LEASE or RENT a home here, plus the organisations and communities that have direct access to those buyers.
target_industries: Senior citizens and retirees seeking independent or assisted living
Adult children and NRIs arranging care/housing for ageing parents in India
Geriatric care and elder-care service providers
Retirement and wealth planning advisors serving 55+ clients
Private wealth and NRI banking relationship teams
Real estate brokers and property consultants (senior / NRI focus)
Senior citizen associations, pensioner forums and clubs
Retired government / PSU / bank employee associations
Rehabilitation, physiotherapy and post-surgery recovery centres
Diagnostic chains and multispeciality clinics with elderly patients
Old-age care NGOs and senior wellness communities
Religious, cultural and alumni groups with large senior membership
Corporate HR / NRI employee networks (children buying for parents)
Estate planning, will and succession advisory firms

scoring_guidance: This is SENIOR-LIVING REAL ESTATE, not B2B software. A strong lead is (a) a senior (55+) or retiree in Bangalore/India, (b) an adult child or NRI arranging housing/care for ageing parents in India, or (c) an organisation or community with DIRECT ACCESS to those buyers (geriatric/home-care providers, retirement & NRI wealth advisors, senior citizen / pensioner associations, rehab centres, elder-care NGOs, senior-focused property consultants, NRI relocation services). fit_score = how closely the lead matches a buyer of a ~INR 50-67L senior home OR a channel that reaches such buyers. trigger_score = strength of buying intent or access to qualified senior buyers (active enquiries, NRI parent-care demand, large senior membership, recent posts about needing senior housing/care) — NOT hiring. reachability_score = can we reach a named person, association office-bearer, or public contact. intent_recency_score = how recent the demand/post/activity is. pain_point = the buyer's real need (safe assisted living for parents, 24/7 medical support, no maintenance burden, community, NRI peace of mind). Be GENEROUS and surface plausible leads even below 30/100 — the team explicitly wants low-confidence buyer leads too; capture them and flag the uncertainty in score_reasoning rather than dropping them.
